  • Changelog

Flattens a contiguous range of dims into a tensor.

Source: R/nn-flatten.R
nn_flatten.Rd

For use with nn_sequential.

Usage

nn_flatten(start_dim = 2, end_dim = -1)

Arguments

start_dim

first dim to flatten (default = 2).

end_dim

last dim to flatten (default = -1).

Shape

  • Input: (*, S_start,..., S_i, ..., S_end, *), where S_i is the size at dimension i and * means any number of dimensions including none.

  • Output: (*, S_start*...*S_i*...S_end, *).

See also

nn_unflatten

Examples

if (torch_is_installed()) {
input <- torch_randn(32, 1, 5, 5)
m <- nn_flatten()
m(input)
}
#> torch_tensor
#> Columns 1 to 6-4.8963e-01 -4.6032e-02  1.1099e+00  1.2991e-01  1.1150e+00 -8.4112e-01
#>  1.3278e+00  3.9578e-01 -4.7505e-01 -2.0945e+00  1.6771e+00  2.5081e-01
#> -6.1959e-01 -6.9444e-01 -1.0943e+00  8.4966e-01  1.1877e+00 -7.1341e-01
#>  5.9460e-01  1.0859e+00  5.1299e-01  3.3193e-01 -3.0133e-01 -1.9106e+00
#> -1.8127e+00  1.6373e+00 -1.9544e+00 -1.4107e-01 -2.0113e+00  2.7575e-01
#>  1.6169e+00 -1.1563e+00 -4.5134e-01 -9.5703e-02  1.0506e+00 -4.9454e-01
#> -1.5623e+00 -7.5619e-01 -6.0841e-01  2.8195e-01  6.1505e-01  6.4247e-01
#> -1.6863e-01 -7.4566e-01  1.8029e-02  1.7657e+00  3.3351e-01  3.9945e-01
#>  1.2158e-01  2.3556e+00 -1.1760e-01 -3.9971e-01  3.6550e-01  3.6606e-01
#>  1.2771e+00  1.1525e+00 -2.1599e+00 -1.9412e-01  6.4840e-01  6.9386e-02
#> -2.9263e-01 -1.0276e+00 -7.9427e-01 -5.9293e-02 -8.4165e-01  4.7883e-01
#>  9.0980e-02 -2.5968e-01  3.9365e-01  1.6773e+00  5.3472e-01 -8.0174e-01
#> -1.7620e+00 -1.8711e-01 -9.4356e-01  6.9917e-01 -8.8245e-01 -1.3410e+00
#> -2.7895e-01 -1.6054e+00 -1.1660e+00  4.6062e-01 -1.5366e+00 -6.7081e-03
